title: Disambiguation issue with interface derived types passed as parameters to generate loop module instantiation
body:
As title. 

A bit more detail:

Wrong-clone / wrong-owner disambiguation

- Fixes cases where interface-derived types or interface references were resolved against the template or wrong clone instead of the specialized instance.
- This includes disambiguating references in more complex hierarchies, including generate-created module instances and interface-derived types passed through parameters.

Added two additional testcases.
